entries.answer: fleasion is safe, nobody's been banned. it's a local proxy that only swaps textures/sounds, doesn't touch game logic

fleasion isn't a virus, that's a false positive. it installs a local CA cert and intercepts https traffic to swap assets — that's exactly the pattern antivirus heuristics flag, but it's safe and open source on github

fleasion is a local proxy. it installs a CA cert so it can read roblox's https traffic, then redirects roblox's asset requests to your own pc instead of roblox's servers. when roblox asks for a texture/sound, fleasion swaps in the custom one before it loads. it's all local, nothing gets sent anywhere, and it doesn't change game logic — just visuals and sounds. that's why it doesn't ban. fleasion isn't my app btw, i just make the textures it swaps in. assets are on github: 66buncer/Rivals-Pack-Assets
nah just rivals/overkill — fleasion only swaps the assets in the config you load, other games and roblox itself work completely normally

download fleasion, load the json config (rivals pack from #minecraft-texturepack, overkill from #overkill-texturepack), enable the config, clear cache, join roblox. tutorial: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bMiMUJ_kIP8
disable the old config in fleasion, clear cache, then rejoin roblox. if that doesn't fix it, open a ticket in #get-help

that's not a virus, it's leftovers from uninstalling fleasion wrong. fix: 1) open C:\Windows\System32\drivers\etc\hosts with notepad as admin, delete lines with roblox/rbxcdn/127.0.0.1, save. 2) Win+R -> certmgr.msc -> Trusted Root Certification Authorities -> Certificates -> delete anything named Fleasion or FleasionNT. 3) Win+R -> inetcpl.cpl -> Connections -> LAN settings -> uncheck use a proxy server. 4) restart pc and try again
nah, fleasion is pc only, mobile isn't possible — it works as a local proxy on your pc, mobile can't run that
yeah works on mac with fleasion v2.2.1+, pc/mac only though, no mobile
download the version without font from #minecraft-texturepack, disable the old config in fleasion, clear cache and rejoin
minecraft classic pack (rivals) has 4 versions: day, night, day+font, night+font. overkill pack has 2: day and night

minecraft classic pack (rivals): grenade->TNT block, knife->diamond sword, crossbow/sniper/fist sounds, minecraft ranks (coal/iron/gold/emerald/diamond/nether star), stone brick arena, mc heart HP, skull killfeed, red arrow damage indicator

yeah it's out (v1.0), grab it in #overkill-texturepack. day & night versions. has: AR->snowball, AWP->ender dragon hit, body hits->mc hit sound, headshots->orb pickup, fists->swing+hit, slide/jumppad/countdown all minecraft'd, full minecraft skybox, minecraft UI icons
yeah i do custom personal packs — open a ticket in #order-here and we'll talk pricing/details. basic/standard/premium tiers depending on how much you want
